svg.text: GitOps-driven cluster training flow from Git branches through Argo CD into Kubernetes jobs.

g.text: The repo is the source of truth for cluster state.
Branches map cleanly to development and production.
Argo CD watches the Nebulift repo, expands the ApplicationSet,
Auto-sync, retries, pruning, and self-heal stay in the loop.
Each Application targets an environment overlay.
Overlays patch namespace, config, and replicas
on top of the shared base resources.
The base manifest defines an indexed Job for
Argo CD keeps cluster resources aligned with Git,
so config changes, image updates, rollbacks, and drift fixes
all flow through commits instead of manual apply.
